items: Drew Rasmussen blanked Boston for 7.0 innings, striking out 13 in Tampa Bay's 7-5 win.
Caleb Durbin homered 2 times in Tampa Bay's 7-5 win over Boston.
Matt Chapman homered 2 times, driving in 3 as San Francisco beat Washington, 11-10.
Tyler Callihan homered 2 times, driving in 4 as Pittsburgh beat The Dodgers, 9-8.
Reid Detmers held down Houston for 7.0 innings, striking out 9 in The Angels's 3-2 win.
Miami pitching combined to shut out Arizona, 8-0.
Texas edged Kansas City, 6-4, in 10 innings.
San Francisco walked off Washington, 11-10 — one of 7 one-run finishes across the league.
